hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then cd /home/user/Schedula && npm run build 2>&1 && npm test 2>&1 && (cd frontend && npm run lint 2>&1) && (cd frontend && npm run build 2>&1) || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"CI checks failed. Fix errors before pushing."}'; exit 0; }; fi; }
